Hero.titleHighlight: independent AI video studio and API
Hero.description: Create production-ready AI videos with SdanceAI's custom workflow. We support models such as Seedance 1.5, Veo, and Sora through one unified interface.
Hero.disclaimer: SdanceAI is an independent product and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by AI model providers.
Hero.wrapperDisclosure: Our service is a custom interface layer built on top of third-party AI models.

Overview.title: Why teams choose SdanceAI
Overview.description: Teams choose SdanceAI for synchronized audio generation, stronger prompt understanding, and cinematic output across supported models, including Seedance 1.5.

items.title: Native Audio Video Generation
items.description: Generate dialogue, sound effects, and atmosphere directly with visuals so scenes feel naturally synchronized.

items.title: Multi-lingual, Multi-person Dialogue
items.description: Create realistic conversations with multiple speakers and better lip-sync alignment across languages.

items.title: Longer Narrative Coherence
items.description: Supports stable story progression and expressive camera movement suitable for drama and ad storytelling.

Capabilities.title: Core production capabilities on SdanceAI
Capabilities.description: Capability highlights for production workflows on SdanceAI, including Seedance 1.5.

items.title: Text to Video with stronger instruction following
items.description: Translate prompts into shots with cleaner object consistency, action timing, and visual style alignment.

items.title: Image to Video for controllable animation
items.description: Animate still images into cinematic clips while keeping identity and scene composition stable.

items.title: Dynamic camera language
items.description: Use references like push-in, dolly, orbit, and handheld motion to produce film-like movement.

items.title: Narrative-ready shot quality
items.description: Built to support short-form narrative creation, from emotional close-ups to wide establishing shots.

items.title: Flexible output framing
items.description: Prepare assets for multiple channels with controllable aspect ratio and framing expectations.

items.title: High-pace production workflows
items.description: Designed for teams that ship frequent video iterations.

UseCases.title: Practical creation scenarios
UseCases.description: Designed for teams that need high-quality narrative clips at production speed.

items.title: Short Drama Episodes
items.description: Produce emotionally coherent scenes with voice, effects, and cinematic pacing for episodic storytelling.

items.title: Performance Marketing Ads
items.description: Generate rapid ad variants with product-centric framing and script-driven narration in multiple tones.

items.title: Social Clip Production
items.description: Create vertical-ready clips for creators and growth teams with repeatable style and fast iteration.

items.title: Brand Concept Visualization
items.description: Prototype campaign narratives before live shoots to validate message, rhythm, and visual identity.

FAQ.title: SdanceAI FAQ
FAQ.description: Common questions about SdanceAI workflows and supported models, including Seedance 1.5.

items.question: What does SdanceAI provide?
items.answer: SdanceAI is an independent AI video platform and API service with a custom interface built on top of third-party models.

items.question: Which models are available on SdanceAI?
items.answer: SdanceAI supports multiple models, including Seedance 1.5. Available models may vary by workflow and update over time.

items.question: Does SdanceAI support native audio generation?
items.answer: Yes. On supported models (such as Seedance 1.5), you can generate speech, sound effects, and background audio synchronized with visuals.

items.question: Can I control first and last frames?
items.answer: Yes. In compatible image-driven workflows, first/last frame controls can guide scene start and end while preserving composition consistency.

items.question: Does SdanceAI support multilingual workflows?
items.answer: Yes. For compatible models, SdanceAI supports multilingual dialogue and localized voice-driven video scenarios.

items.question: Is SdanceAI affiliated with model providers?
items.answer: No. SdanceAI is an independent product and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by model providers.

CTA.title: Ready to build with SdanceAI?
CTA.description: Start from the generation studio above, then scale with existing pricing plans across supported models.
